Uses of Class
com.github.copilot.sdk.json.ResumeSessionConfig

Packages that use ResumeSessionConfig
Package
Description
com.github.copilot.sdk
Core classes for the GitHub Copilot SDK for Java.
com.github.copilot.sdk.json
Configuration classes and data transfer objects for the Copilot SDK.

  • Uses of ResumeSessionConfig in com.github.copilot.sdk

    Methods in com.github.copilot.sdk with parameters of type ResumeSessionConfig
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<CopilotSession>
    CopilotClient.resumeSession(String sessionId, ResumeSessionConfig config)
    Resumes an existing Copilot session.

  • Uses of ResumeSessionConfig in com.github.copilot.sdk.json

    Methods in com.github.copilot.sdk.json that return ResumeSessionConfig
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.clone()
    Creates a shallow clone of this ResumeSessionConfig instance.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setAgent(String agent)
    Sets the name of the custom agent to activate when the session starts.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setAvailableTools(List<String> availableTools)
    Sets the list of tool names that are allowed in this session.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setClientName(String clientName)
    Sets the client name to identify the application using the SDK.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setCommands(List<CommandDefinition> commands)
    Sets slash commands registered for this session.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setConfigDir(String configDir)
    Sets the configuration directory path.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setCustomAgents(List<CustomAgentConfig> customAgents)
    Sets custom agent configurations.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setDisabledSkills(List<String> disabledSkills)
    Sets skills that should be disabled for this session.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setDisableResume(boolean disableResume)
    Sets whether to disable the session.resume event.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setExcludedTools(List<String> excludedTools)
    Sets the list of tool names to exclude from this session.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setHooks(SessionHooks hooks)
    Sets hook handlers for session lifecycle events.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setInfiniteSessions(InfiniteSessionConfig infiniteSessions)
    Sets the infinite session configuration for persistent workspaces and automatic compaction.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setMcpServers(Map<String,Object> mcpServers)
    Sets MCP (Model Context Protocol) server configurations.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setModel(String model)
    Sets the AI model to use for the resumed session.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setOnElicitationRequest(ElicitationHandler onElicitationRequest)
    Sets a handler for elicitation requests from the server or MCP tools.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setOnEvent(Consumer<AbstractSessionEvent> onEvent)
    Sets an event handler that is registered on the session before the session.resume RPC is issued.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setOnPermissionRequest(PermissionHandler onPermissionRequest)
    Sets a handler for permission requests from the assistant.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setOnUserInputRequest(UserInputHandler onUserInputRequest)
    Sets a handler for user input requests from the agent.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setProvider(ProviderConfig provider)
    Sets a custom API provider for BYOK scenarios.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setReasoningEffort(String reasoningEffort)
    Sets the reasoning effort level for models that support it.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setSkillDirectories(List<String> skillDirectories)
    Sets directories containing skill definitions.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setStreaming(boolean streaming)
    Sets whether to enable streaming of response chunks.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setSystemMessage(SystemMessageConfig systemMessage)
    Sets the system message configuration.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setTools(List<ToolDefinition> tools)
    Sets custom tools that the assistant can invoke during the session.
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setWorkingDirectory(String workingDirectory)
    Sets the working directory for the session.
